evals.prompt: I need OCSP Must-Staple for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the ocsp-must-staple-checker skill for this ocsp must staple checker request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects ocsp-must-staple-checker for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_check_ocsp_must_staple.
Keeps the response focused on checking OCSP Must-Staple (RFC 7633) compliance. A certificate with Must-Staple that fails to provide an OCSP staple causes hard-failures in compliant clients.

evals.prompt: Handle a focused ocsp must staple checker workflow for example.com; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the ocsp-must-staple-checker skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects ocsp-must-staple-checker instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
